aboutPreview.title: Meet Tucker Eads, LCSW

paragraphs.text: With over 7 years of experience in psychotherapy, I specialize in helping individuals navigate anxiety, stress, life transitions, and the challenges of chronic health conditions.
My approach is grounded in evidence-based therapies including Acceptance and Commitment Therapy (ACT) and Dialectical Behavior Therapy (DBT), tailored to your unique needs and goals.

aboutPreview.quote: I believe in creating a warm, collaborative space where you can explore your experiences and develop the tools to live a meaningful life aligned with your values.
